zh.Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, F: 法國布格-福朗-可特艾圖希
zh.Bazarne, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France: 法國布格尼艾福巴札內
zh.Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne, France: 法國布格-福朗-可特艾喬尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nargeot de Toucy於大約1130年出生在法國布格圖希時，他的父親Ithier de Toucy III29歲，母親Elisabeth de Joigny31歲。他於1152年與Agnès de Dampierre在法國布格蒙特雷阿爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1192年在巴勒斯坦منطقة الشمالعكّا享年63歲。

zh-hans.Bazarne, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France: 法国布格尼艾福巴札內
zh-hans.Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne, France: 法国布格-福朗-可特艾喬尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nargeot de Toucy于大约1130年出生在法国布格圖希时，他的父亲Ithier de Toucy III29岁，母亲Elisabeth de Joigny31岁。他于1152年与Agnès de Dampierre在法国布格蒙特雷阿爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1192年在巴勒斯坦منطقة الشمالعكّا享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Cecile, Lucien, Gilles, Normand, Marcel, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Paul, Laurent, Alphonse.
French: habitational name from Soucy, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Soucie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Ludger, Pierre.

en.lifeSummary: When Nargeot de Toucy was born about 1130, in Toucy, Yonne, Burgundy, France, his father, Ithier de Toucy III, was 29 and his mother, Elisabeth de Joigny, was 31. He married Agnès de Dampierre in 1152, in Montréal, Yonne, Burgundy, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1192, in Acre, Northern, Palestine, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nargeot de Toucy est né environ 1130, à Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne, France, son père, Ithier de Toucy III, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Joigny, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Agnès de Dampierre en 1152, à Montréal, Yonne, Bourgogne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1192, à Acre, Northern, Palestine, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nargeot de Toucy um 1130 in Toucy, Yonne, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ithier de Toucy III 29 und seine Mutter Elisabeth de Joigny 31. Er hat 1152 in Montréal, Yonne, Burgund, Frankreich Agnès de Dampierre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1192 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Acre, Northern, Palästina.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nargeot de Toucy è nato il circa 1130 nel Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, il suo padre, Ithier de Toucy III, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth de Joigny, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Agnès de Dampierre nel 1152, nel Montréal, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1192, nel Acre, Northern, Palestina, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nargeot de Toucyが約1130年にフランスボウルゴグンイオントウシで生まれた時，父Ithier de Toucy IIIは29歳，母Elisabeth de Joignyは31歳であった。1152年にフランスボウルゴグンイオンモントルeアルでAgnès de Dampierreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1192年にパレスチナمنطقة الشمالعكّاで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nargeot de Toucy(이)가 대략 1130년 프랑스 부르고그니 욘 토우시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ithier de Toucy III(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth de Joigny(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1152년 프랑스 부르고그니 욘 몽e앨에서 Agnès de Dampierre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1192년 팔레스타인 منطقة الشمال عكّا에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nargeot de Toucy nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Ithier de Toucy III, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Joigny, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnès de Dampierre em 1152, em Montréal, Yonne, Bourgogne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1192, em Acre, Northern, Palestina, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nargeot de Toucy родился около 1130 г. в местности тоуси, енн, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Ithier de Toucy III было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Joigny, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès de Dampierre в 1152 г. в местности монтрeаль, енн, бургогн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1192 г. в местности عكّا, منطقة الشمال, Палестина в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nargeot de Toucy nació aproximadamente 1130, en Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Ithier de Toucy III, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Joigny, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Agnès de Dampierre en 1152, en Montréal, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1192, en Acre, Northern, Palestina, a la edad de 63 años.
